name: Apple Raspberry Streusel Pie
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces (1 package) frozen raspberries, thawed and drained, with 1/2 cup liquid reserved
recipeInstructions:
Prepare pie crust according to package directions for a filled one-crust pie, using a 9-inch pie pan. Refrigerate remaining crust.
Heat oven to 375°F.
Place apples in a medium bowl and sprinkle with lemon juice; toss.
In a large saucepan, combine sugar, cornstarch, and cinnamon. Stir in the reserved raspberry liquid. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and fold in drained raspberries and apples. Pour into pie crust-lined pan.
Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup; level off. In a medium bowl, combine all topping ingredients to form crumbs; sprinkle over fruit mixture.
Bake at 375°F for 40-50 minutes or until the crust is golden brown. Cover edge of pie crust with strips of foil after 15-20 minutes of baking to prevent excessive browning. Cool.
8 servings.
